originalBehavior: The published article uses a sticky text-and-visual scrollytelling shell where section progression drives changes in the tree and scatter visuals.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published scroll observer and chart containers, with only shell-level cleanup for metadata, branding, and footer policy.
notes: The section IDs and data-index markers were preserved so the original scroll-driven transitions still fire.
The route continues to load as a vendored static build under the nested GitHub Pages-style subpath.
evidence: The current plan treats story progression and chart-text synchronization as parity-critical behavior.
Shared smoke coverage scrolls through the route and confirms later decision-tree states render after the observer advances.
